basics.name: Johan Meneses
basics.label: Senior Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, user-focused web products with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I’ve worked across product development, CMS-driven platforms, client-facing websites, and internal tools, with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and clean user experiences. I also bring hands-on experience in end-to-end HTML email development and campaign delivery for audiences of 100K+ subscribers, which gives me the flexibility to adapt to different frontend and marketing technology needs. Based in Colombia, fully remote, and open to opportunities with US and EU teams.

work.name: Takeoff Media
work.summary:
→ Build and maintain production web applications for multiple markets using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Prismic, helping teams ship scalable, content-driven experiences.

→ Own the end-to-end HTML email development process, from implementation and cross-client QA to deployment, supporting campaigns sent to 100K+ subscribers.

→ Deliver responsive email campaigns through Stripo, Email on Acid, Braze, and Salesforce Marketing Cloud, improving execution reliability across major email clients.

→ Contribute across a mixed frontend stack that includes Vue.js, balancing feature delivery, performance, and long-term maintainability.

📦 Next.js · React · TypeScript · Prismic · HTML Email Development · Stripo · Email on Acid · Braze · Salesforce Marketing Cloud · Vue.js · REST API

work.name: Siesa
work.summary:
→ Developed custom WordPress plugins in PHP that replaced manual support workflows for 200+ internal users.

→ Integrated internal systems through REST APIs, automating key processes and reducing manual data entry by an estimated 40%.

→ Maintained a public customer support portal and a company-wide intranet, improving reliability and day-to-day efficiency for 500+ employees.

📦 PHP · WordPress · MySQL · REST API · JavaScript · HTML · CSS

work.name: GB Media Group
work.summary:
→ Built responsive, cross-browser websites for multiple clients using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, turning complex designs into maintainable production code.

→ Collaborated directly with clients on wireframes and visual prototypes, helping align requirements before development started.

→ Managed deployment and launch tasks for 5+ client projects, including domains, SSL, email setup, and ongoing site administration.

→ Implemented custom PHP features to support backend functionality and dynamic content needs.

📦 React · JavaScript · HTML · CSS · PHP · Responsive Design · Cross-browser Compatibility

projects.name: Clinic Dentist
projects.description: Private client project: a full-stack platform for dental clinics covering patient records, appointment scheduling, and treatment billing. Includes an interactive digital odontogram for clinical tracking and role-based access for admins, dentists, and receptionists.

projects.name: Studio Models
projects.description: Marketing website for a model agency focused on talent scouting and fashion production. Built with Astro for fast performance and integrated Resend to streamline contact and inquiry workflows.

projects.name: GB Media Group
projects.description: Corporate website for a digital services agency, built with React and Prismic. Designed to give non-technical teams a flexible editing experience while keeping the UI clean, responsive, and easy to maintain.

projects.name: Edpracol Website
projects.description: High-performance landing page for a beauty and personal care distributor. Combines GSAP animations, Prismic CMS, and performance-focused implementation to deliver a polished experience with strong Core Web Vitals.
